title: Pilot Was Taking Pictures Before South Korean Fighter Jets Collided
summary_full: A member of the other plane’s crew was making a video to commemorate the mission, the government said in a report on the 2021 crash. No one was hurt.
summary_public: A member of the other plane’s crew was making a video to commemorate the mission, the government said in a report on the 2021 crash. No one was hurt.
